message:
refactor(core): Improve context, scheduler, and sync pool modules

Enhance core runtime components with better context handling,
local queue scheduling improvements, and sync pool optimizations.

- Update cx/cx.rs context management
- Improve scheduler/local_queue.rs task handling
- Optimize sync/pool.rs resource management
- Update Cargo.toml dependencies

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -33,7 +33,6 @@ path = "src/lib.rs"
 # Phase 0: prefer std/core; avoid bringing in executors/runtimes.
 # Dependencies added here must preserve determinism in the lab runtime.
 thiserror = "2.0"
-crossbeam-deque = "0.8"
 crossbeam-queue = "0.3"
 parking_lot = "0.12"
 polling = "2.8"
